From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

2011 American TV series or program

***Rage of the Yeti*** is a 2011 [monster movie](/wiki/Monster_movie "Monster movie") by [Syfy](/wiki/Syfy "Syfy").[[1]](#cite_note-1)[[2]](#cite_note-2)

## Plot summary

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Rage_of_the_Yeti&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Plot summary")]

Two groups of treasure hunters, each from all walks of life are dispatched to the Arctic to get items that a wealthy millionaire, Mills is interested in but both groups soon find themselves fighting for their lives as they battle the freezing cold, Russians and a pack of crazed [Yetis](/wiki/Yeti "Yeti").

## Cast

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Rage_of_the_Yeti&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Cast")]

* [David Chokachi](/wiki/David_Chokachi "David Chokachi") as Jonas
* Matthew Kevin Anderson as Jace
* [Yancy Butler](/wiki/Yancy_Butler "Yancy Butler") as Villers
* [Laura Haddock](/wiki/Laura_Haddock "Laura Haddock") as Ashley
* Atanas Srebrev as Eidelman
* [David Hewlett](/wiki/David_Hewlett "David Hewlett") as Mills
* [Jonas Armstrong](/wiki/Jonas_Armstrong "Jonas Armstrong") as Bill
* James Patric Moran as Ted
* [Rosalind Halstead](/wiki/Rosalind_Halstead "Rosalind Halstead") as Lynda
* Emilia Klayn as Laura
* Jesse Steele as Walterson
* Mike Straub as Hedges
* [Mark Dymond](/wiki/Mark_Dymond "Mark Dymond") as Bud
* Kitodar Todorov as The Maitre Di
* Hristo Balabanov as Chopper Guy 1
* Jordan Andonov as Chopper Guy 2
* Igmar Uribe as Guard
* Velislav Pavlov as Pilot
* V.J. Benson as Co-Pilot
